title: ELARA Zenith Chronograph
description: A masterpiece of horology. The Zenith Chronograph features a titanium grade 5 case, sapphire crystal, and an automatic movement with a 72-hour power reserve. Minimalist gray dial with cyan accents.

title: Aura Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Immersive sound. The Aura series uses proprietary adaptive noise cancellation and spatial audio technology. Crafted from premium sustainable leather and recycled aluminum.

title: Lumina Smart Lamp
description: Lighting that understands you. Lumina adjusts color temperature based on your circadian rhythm. Beautifully carved wooden base with a frosted glass orb.

title: Nova 14-inch Laptop Sleeve
description: Protection in style. Hand-stitched full-grain leather with a soft microfiber interior. Slim profile for the modern professional.
